text:
Created attachment 211210
Updated to 20190722

Hello.
I found a port astro/sofa, but it is outdated. The actual version is 20190722.
You can see the latest changes on http://www.iausofa.org/current_changes.html.
I updated the Makefile to build a new version of SOFA.
Sorry if this report is incorrect - it is my first report. Tell me please, if I can to improve it.
Thanks.
